page_content: Special Permissions & Exceptions to Policy Permission/Exception What does it mean? What should you do? By Permission Only - appear in Schedule of Classes as: (Perm Req) You need permission from the department to register for the course. This permission is required for all students. Contact the department offering the course You are attempting to add, drop, or make To request an exception to make a change to the course, Changes after schedule adjustment period a change to grading method or credit level submit an exception to policy request following your after the academic deadline. academic advising college instructions. Gen Ed requirement You have over 60 credits and are only allowed to register for one General Education course. To request to register for another Gen Ed course, follow the instructions of your academic advising college. Oversubscribe into closed course You are attempting to register for a course whose seats have been filled. Add yourself to the waitlist, if available. Check out instructions for Waitlist and Hold File (p. 20) You are attempting to register for a course To request an exception to the pass/fail grading Pass/Fail override with the pass/fail grading method but do not requirements, submit an exception to policy request meet the Pass/Fail grading requirements. following your academic advising college instructions. You are attempting to register for a course To request permission for a third repeat, submit an Repeat Course for the third time, this is in violation of the exception to policy request following your academic Repeat Course Guidelines. advising college instructions. Repeat Limit You are attempting to register for a course which will exceed the repeat credit limit, this is in violation of the Repeat Course Guidelines. To request permission to exceed the repeat limit, submit an exception to policy request following your academic advising college instructions. Seats reserved for incoming students Please review the Seat Management Plan at registrar.umd.edu/registration/register-classes/seat- management-plan for additional information.
